title: Battle of Ylesia (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle of Ylesia''' can mean:

*[[Galactic War]]
**[[Battle in the Cha Raaba system]]
*[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]
**[[Raid on Colony Three]]
**[[Battle of Ylesia]]; between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]]
**[[Skirmish over Ylesia]]; between the Rebel Alliance and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
*[[Yuuzhan Vong War]]
**A [[Battle of Ylesia (26 ABY)|battle]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]
**The [[Battle of Ylesia (28 ABY)|Battle of Ylesia]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]
